name: yxj-paper-os
description: Minimal paper-planning Codex plugin that guides information completion and compiles writing design packs.

interface.shortDescription: Prepare paper projects for downstream writing with a design pack.
interface.longDescription: YXJ Paper OS is a minimal Codex plugin for traffic, computer-science, and AI paper planning. It guides information completion, enforces claim/evidence boundaries, and compiles a writing design pack for downstream writing modules without drafting the manuscript itself.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use yxj-paper-os to prepare my paper project information and compile a writing design pack.
